result.stdout:
DeltaQ 2.1.0.0

Usage: dq [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  bsdiff   Generate a BSDIFF-compatible delta (difference) between two files
  bspatch  Apply a BSDIFF-compatible delta (patch) to an original file and generate an output file

Use "dq [command] --help" for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
DeltaQ 2.1.0.0

Usage: dq [options] [command]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information

Commands:
  bsdiff   Generate a BSDIFF-compatible delta (difference) between two files
  bspatch  Apply a BSDIFF-compatible delta (patch) to an original file and generate an output file

Use "dq [command] --help" for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: dq bsdiff [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  [oldfile]    Original file (input)
  [newfile]    New file (input)
  [deltafile]  Delta file (output)

Options:
  -?|-h|--help             Show help information
  -ss|--suffix-sort <LIB>  Suffix sort library: [sais], [divsufsort]
